title: … Since 1970 we’ve experienced four statewide droughts, and currently, we’re clearly in the midst of another.
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has not completed a major water storage project of statewide significance since the late 1970s.",
    "Voters have approved more than $27 billion in natural resource general obligation bonds since 1996, with only $2.7 billion dedicated to water storage.",
    "Not a single drop of water has been stored from the funding approved in Proposition 1.",
    "Without substantial new investments in infrastructure, California will remain in a state of perpetual drought.",
    "The decision to bar thousands of farmers from pulling water from the Sacramento-San Joaquin Delta watershed will have a devastating impact on communities and the global food chain.",
    "Water theft has reached record levels in California this year, largely attributed to illegal cannabis grow operations.",
    "California will continue to face water shortages for years to come if new actions are not taken by the Governor."
  ]
}
```
